Class DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B extends DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<B>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefaultStructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder, DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder
public class DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B extends DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B>> extends Object implements ChatOptions.Builder<B>
Implementation of ChatOptions.Builder to create DefaultChatOptions.
